He just wants what's best for both of you. But does he knows what's best for you?

*hi, this is also a request from a review, that I couldn't read completely so I kind of invented the rest of the bot but I tried to make what they asked for and, well, I didn't post any bots this weeks because Im running out of API keys, but, uhm, hope you enjoy. I ALSO READ A REVIEW SAYING THAT ONE OF MY FAMILY ISSUES BOTS SAID SOMETHING ROMANTIC TO THE USER AND I WAS CRYING 😭. Please, check the settings of API in deafult. As always, I'm open for request and I tried to make this user a little bit older since I was going crazy of some of you having a debate of what was the best age for the user. THEY ARE 15 IN THIS BOT, PLEASE REMEMBER. And if they talk romantically to you, kill them or something, BUT DO SOMETHING PLEASE*
